sandboxId.description: The ID of the sandbox to which the file belongs. This is used to associate the file with a specific sandbox environment.

path.description: The file path within the sandbox, e.g. '/app/config.json', '/home/user/.ssh/id_rsa', etc.

content.description: The content of the file. This will be written to the specified path within the sandbox. The content should be base64 encoded if it's binary data.

path.description: The file path within the sandbox, e.g. '/app/config.json', '/home/user/.ssh/id_rsa', etc.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the file was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the file was last updated.

items.description: A file to add to the sandbox
